name: PowerShell Scripts Installed as Services - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova
SIGMA Title: PowerShell Scripts Installed as Services - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects powershell script installed as a Service

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%powershell%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%pwsh%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY PowerShell Scripts Installed as Services - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%powershell%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%pwsh%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: PowerShell Scripts Installed as Services - Security

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
